title: Werkstudent (w/m/d) Program & Project Management
required_skills: Active student enrollment in civil engineering, architecture, or related field
Civil engineering / construction project management background
Basic knowledge of construction contract law (VOB)
bonus_skills: Prior practical experience in construction project management
matched_skills: MS Office / Excel — strong MS Office skills referenced across roles
Project coordination mindset — general PM experience from HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd
missing_skills: Active student enrollment — Boru is not a current student
Construction contract management or VOB knowledge
German language at required proficiency (B1 only)

core_responsibilities: Support project control for demanding infrastructure projects
Review and evaluate contractor additional service offers (Nachtragsangebote)
Perform site measurements and acceptance checks
Create billing documentation and progress documentation
recommended_emphasis: General project coordination and documentation skills (for any relevant points)
Multi-workstream tracking experience from HSBC PMO
summary: Scoring only 8.3, this is a very poor match. This Werkstudent role requires a civil engineering or architecture student for infrastructure construction project support — entirely outside Boru Lai's background in PMO governance, marketing, and business transformation. Boru is also not a student. Application is not recommended under any circumstances.
